doc_long_cell_biology.1: The Anderson sequence contains the mitochondrial genome. The cell arise principle describes how cells originate. Lynn Margulis developed the endosymbiotic theory. Matthias Schleiden formulated the cell theory. The membrane binds the nucleus. The membrane includes the nucleus. Mitochondria originate their own circular DNA. Robert Hooke coined the term "cell." Van Leeuwenhoek used a microscope. Mitochondria originated photosynthesis.

doc_long_climate_change.1: Calculating the raise in global temperature is essential. The global mean surface temperature rises by degrees Celsius. High temperatures exceed a part of the norm. The IPCC synthesizes climate science. The Nations Environment Programme establishes an intergovernmental panel. Satellite observation begins at a percent level. That document shows a steady rise.

doc_long_cryptography.1: AES replaces the older encryption standard. Neal Koblitz offers equivalent security. Phil Zimmermann brings key cryptography. Quantum computers motivate ongoing research. Ron Rivest provides the first practical key encryption. RSA Security factors large composite numbers. A security agency publishes the SHA-256 hash function. Vincent Rijmen selects the encryption standard. Whitfield Diffie shares key exchange.

James Watson builds the helix structure. Kimura argues the neutral theory. Russel Wallace prompts a joint presentation. Synthesis forms modern evolutionary synthesis.

doc_long_french_revolution.1: King Louis XVI captures France. Napoleon Bonaparte crowns himself emperor. Parisians storm the Bastille fortress. The Third Estate pledges the Tennis Court Oath. A thousand people are executed during the reign.

doc_long_immune_system.1: Adaptive immunity produces a specific response. B cells produce antibodies. Edward Jenner protects against cowpox exposure. The first mRNA vaccine receives emergency authorization. Frank Macfarlane Burnet explains antibody specificity. The immune system signals molecules. Innate immunity provides immediate non-specific defense. Louis Pasteur establishes the scientific basis. Susumu Tonegawa earns a Nobel Prize.

doc_long_industrial_revolution.1:
Edmund Cartwright automates weaving.  
The first factory system decentralizes the cottage industry.  
James Hargreaves mechanizes the textile industry.  
James Watt increases efficiency.  
Liverpool demonstrates commercial viability.  
Railways use steam locomotives.  
The use of steam revolutionizes iron production.  
Workers reshape the social structure.

Liverpool demonstrates commercial viability. The railway uses the steam locomotive. The use revolutionizes iron production. Workers reshape the social structure.

doc_long_internet_history.1: Arpanet connects nodes. The internet follows deprecation. NCSA releases the Mosaic browser. Tim Berners-Lee introduces HTML. These technologies become the foundation.

doc_long_neural_networks.1: AlexNet marks the beginning. Frank Rosenblatt learns a simple pattern. Jürgen Schmidhuber and Sepp Hochreiter introduce the long-term memory network. Marvin Minsky exposes a limitation. OpenAI releases GPT-3. David Rumelhart popularizes the backpropagation algorithm. Ashish Vaswani introduces the transformer architecture. Warren McCulloch proposes the first mathematical model. Yann LeCun demonstrates power.

doc_long_periodic_table.1: Dmitri Mendeleev organizes elements. Scientists create synthetic elements. Glenn Seaborg contributes to plutonium. Henry Moseley resolves inconsistencies. The IUPAC names oganesson as an element. The modern periodic table confirms confirmed elements.
doc_long_periodic_table.2: Dmitri Mendeleev organizes elements. Henry Moseley resolves inconsistency. The modern periodic table confirms confirmed elements. Scientists create synthetic elements.

doc_long_quantum_mechanics.1: Carl Anderson observes which. The Copenhagen interpretation understands quantum measurement. Light explains the photoelectric effect. Matter exhibits like properties. Max Planck resolves the ultraviolet catastrophe. Niels Bohr postulates discrete electron orbits. That is matrix mechanics. Werner Heisenberg articulates the uncertainty principle.

Carl Anderson observes which.  
The Copenhagen interpretation understands quantum measurement.  
Light explains the photoelectric effect.  
Matter exhibits a property.  
Max Planck resolves the ultraviolet catastrophe.  
Niels Bohr postulates a discrete electron orbit.  
That is matrix mechanics.  
Werner Heisenberg articulates the uncertainty principle.

doc_long_relativity.1: Albert Einstein establishes constancy. Arthur Eddington confirms which. Distant galaxy supports expansion prediction. Einstein causes gravity. doc_long_roman_empire.1: The Eastern Roman Empire continues. The last emperor rules the Eastern Roman Empire. Octavian becomes the first Roman emperor. The Roman Empire reaches its territorial peak.

doc_long_solar_system.1: The asteroid belt contains millions of asteroids. Earth possesses a natural satellite. The International Astronomical Union reclassifies Pluto. Jupiter knows known moons. Mars shows extensive evidence of water. Mercury is the closest planet to the Sun. Saturn composes a famous ring system. The Sun powers itself. Venus exceeds 460 degrees Celsius. Wind can reach a speed of one kilometre per hour.

doc_long_world_war_two.1: The Allied invasion opens the Western European front. The Battle of France is the first major battle. Germany conquers France. Germany follows the fall of Poland.
